instruction: In Terminal, use songsee to generate a multi-panel visualization for "$HOME/Desktop/Ode to Joy.mp3" with spectrogram,mel,chroma,mfcc, starting at 18 seconds and lasting 12 seconds, using the magma style, with width 1600 and height 900, window 4096, hop 512, and a frequency range from 80 Hz to 8000 Hz, then save the result as a PNG file at "$HOME/Desktop/songsee_combo_1.png".
reference_command: songsee "$HOME/Desktop/Ode to Joy.mp3" --viz spectrogram,mel,chroma,mfcc --start 18 --duration 12 --style magma --width 1600 --height 900 --window 4096 --hop 512 --min-freq 80 --max-freq 8000 --format png -o "$HOME/Desktop/songsee_combo_1.png"
